title: Interactive Standee Installation AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 Chinese interactive face-in-hole die-cut standee for little astronaut helmet standee character with a round face cutout in family science exploration hall activity zone. Subject: little astronaut helmet standee character with a round face cutout includes a clear face cutout in the upper-middle area and a complete role-play body below so visitors can place their face into the character. Scene: family science exploration hall activity zone appears as a lightly blurred real store, mall, playground, venue, or activity-zone background that supports photo check-ins without stealing focus. Composition: Fixed full vertical standee rendering with irregular die-cut outline, integrated head hole, complete body, stable base, front/middle/back layering, large theme props, and enough space for a real visitor behind it. Signature Elements: Face cutout, complete role body, irregular silhouette, themed oversized props, layered standee depth, stable base, real venue context, and customer photo-op usability. Source anchor: ai image prompt archive anchor 17F393. Style: Bright family-friendly interactive installation design, cute dimensional standee, realistic KT board or PVC foam board material, clear edge thickness, local shadows, and social-media check-in polish. Color Palette: Fixed cheerful theme-color system led by the character concept, clean bright accents, readable Chinese title colors, and soft venue neutrals. Lighting: Bright clean indoor event lighting with visible material thickness, soft floor shadows, readable cutout edge, and clear face-hole structure. Typography: 小小宇航员, 今天你来登月！, and 星球探索馆 appear as the only large readable Chinese text integrated into signboards, helmets, props, or themed frame elements. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
